entry.title: esLibre 2026
entry.summary: Sesiones Participaré como ponente en esLibre 2026 en Melide, del 17 al 18 de abril. FOSDEM es un evento gratuito para desarrolladores de software donde pueden reunirse, compartir ideas y colaborar. Cada año, cientos de desarrolladores de software libre y de código abierto de toda España se dan cita en la conferencia. No es necesario registrarse. ¡Solo tienes que venir y participar! Aquí están...

entry.title: Entrevistas en Diferido
entry.summary: Entrevista para el canal Entrevistas en Diferido #EntrevistaJoseCastilloLema @josecastillolema Empezamos nueva entrevista, esta semana tenemos tenemos a Jose Castillo Lema, trabaja en Red Hat, profesor, ponente y mucho mas, lo mejor es que se presente el mismo. Pero antes… ¿Cómo te encuentras? Y ahora. ¿te podrías presentar en unas palabras? ¡Buenos días a todos! Soy José, de Santiago de...

entry.title: Migrating from Jekyll Minimal Mistakes theme to Chirpy

link.title: Migrating from Jekyll Minimal Mistakes theme to Chirpy

entry.summary: This site was originally built with the Minimal Mistakes Jekyll theme, still available here. After several years, I have migrated to Chirpy, a more modern and feature-rich theme. Why Chirpy Modern UI with dark/light mode toggle, responsive sidebar navigation, and clean typography Built-in TOC (table of contents) with smooth scrolling and active heading tracking Native Mermaid support: ...

entry.title: Top GitHub users
entry.summary: Per country List of most active GitHub users based on public contributions private contributions and number of followers by country or state. The list updated 2026/2/12 1:33 AM UTC. The repository contains users 138 countries and 674 cities. To get into the list you need to have minimum number of followers that varies in each country. Spain :es: The public/total contributions and followers ...

entry.title: FOSDEM 2026
entry.summary: Sessions I will be speaking at FOSDEM 2026 in Brussels from the 31st of January to the 1st of February. FOSDEM is a free event for software developers to meet, share ideas and collaborate. Every year, thousands of developers of free and open source software from all over the world gather at the event in Brussels. You don’t need to register. Just turn up and join in! Here are my sessions: ...
